name: osc~
description: Band-limited sinusoidal oscillator.

name: phasor~
description: Ramp oscillator that runs from 0 to 1.

name: noise~
description: White-noise generator.
Multiply one signal or scalar by another.
Add one signal or scalar to another.

name: sig~
description: Convert a float into a signal.

name: line~
description: Generate audio-rate ramps from target/time pairs.

name: vline~
description: Sample-accurate ramp generator for envelopes.

name: lop~
description: One-pole low-pass filter.

name: hip~
description: One-pole high-pass filter.

name: dac~
description: Send audio to the system output.

name: adc~
description: Receive audio from the system input.

name: metro
description: Metronome that outputs bangs at a fixed interval.

name: tgl
description: Toggle GUI that outputs 0/1.

name: bng
description: Bang GUI button.

name: float
description: Store and output a float.

name: pack
description: Pack atoms into a list.
arguments: type template such as f f s

name: unpack
description: Unpack a list into separate outputs.
arguments: type template such as f f s

name: select
description: Compare an incoming atom against match values.

name: route
description: Route lists or messages by selector.

name: trigger
description: Force evaluation order and output types.
arguments: output specifiers such as b f s a

name: send
description: Send messages to a named receiver.

name: receive
description: Receive messages from a named sender.
